message:
fix(agent-watch): Require --format jsonl for streaming output

Adds early validation in run_agent_watch() to enforce JSONL output
format, returning ArgsError if any other format is specified.

The agent watch command produces continuous streaming events that
must be machine-parseable. JSONL (one JSON object per line) is the
only appropriate format for:
- Streaming event consumers
- Process supervisors parsing output
- Log aggregation pipelines

Human-readable formats (table, text) would break streaming parsers,
so we fail fast with a clear error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
